title: LightItemremove
description: Effortlessly clean up dropped items with a sleek hologram countdown
body:
![w](https://i.imgur.com/dtzr3DH.jpeg)
## LightItemRemove

**Light Item Removal and Hologram Countdown**

LightItemRemove keeps your server tidy by removing dropped items after a set time. It adds a hologram above the items displaying the remaining time. It’s customizable and performance-friendly.

**Features:**

**Automatic Item Removal:** Clears dropped items after the specified time.

**Hologram Countdown:** Displays a customizable countdown hologram above items.

**Excluded Items:** Exclude specific items from being removed.

**Lightweight and Optimized:** Uses asynchronous tasks for minimal server load.

**World-Based Timers:** Set different removal times per world.

**Owner Protection:** Only the dropper can pick up items for the first 10 seconds.

**Disabled Worlds:** Completely disable item removal in specific worlds.

**Item Merging:** Nearby identical items merge into single stacks.

## Why LightItemRemove?
**Performance-Friendly:** Uses minimal server resources.

**Flexible Configuration:** Easily customizable through the config file.

**User-Friendly:** Holograms make it easy for users to know when items will be removed.

##


LightItemRemove is an essential plugin that simplifies ıtem management and enhances user experience on your server. Download now and try it out on your server!

**If you have any issues or suggestions, join our Discord server.**
